parameters.query:
INSERT INTO deals (deal_id, company_name, sender_domains, deal_stage, is_active, created_at)
VALUES ('{{ $json.deal_id }}', '{{ $json.company_name }}', ARRAY['{{ $json.sender_domain }}'], 'Discover', true, NOW())
ON CONFLICT (deal_id) DO UPDATE SET
  company_name = CASE WHEN deals.company_name = 'Unknown' THEN EXCLUDED.company_name ELSE deals.company_name END,
  updated_at = NOW()
RETURNING deal_id, company_name

INSERT INTO calendar_events (google_event_id, deal_id, title, start_time, end_time, location, organizer, attendees, meeting_type)
VALUES (
  '{{ $('Code: Parse Calendar Event').first().json.event_id }}',
  '{{ $('Code: Parse Calendar Event').first().json.deal_id }}',
  '{{ $('Code: Parse Calendar Event').first().json.subject }}',
  NULLIF('{{ $('Code: Parse Calendar Event').first().json.start }}', '')::timestamptz,
  NULLIF('{{ $('Code: Parse Calendar Event').first().json.end }}', '')::timestamptz,
  '{{ $('Code: Parse Calendar Event').first().json.location }}',
  '{{ $('Code: Parse Calendar Event').first().json.organizer }}',
  ARRAY['{{ $('Code: Parse Calendar Event').first().json.attendees }}'],
  'meeting'
)
ON CONFLICT (google_event_id) DO UPDATE SET
  title = EXCLUDED.title,
  start_time = EXCLUDED.start_time,
  end_time = EXCLUDED.end_time,
  attendees = EXCLUDED.attendees,
  updated_at = NOW()
RETURNING (xmax = 0) AS is_new_insert

INSERT INTO ingestion_log (message_id, deal_id, doc_type, sender_email, subject, chunk_count, attribution_confidence, attribution_status, ingested_at)
VALUES (
  '{{ $('Code: Parse Calendar Event').first().json.event_id }}',
  '{{ $('Code: Parse Calendar Event').first().json.deal_id }}',
  'calendar_invite',
  '{{ $('Code: Parse Calendar Event').first().json.organizer }}',
  '{{ $('Code: Parse Calendar Event').first().json.subject }}',
  1,
  'high',
  'confirmed',
  NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (message_id) DO NOTHING
